earthing.title: Earthing Systems
earthing.text: The earthing system must provide a low-impedance path to facilitate the operation of protective devices in the event of a fault.

testing.title: Testing Protocols
testing.text: Mandatory tests include: 1. Earth Continuity, 2. Insulation Resistance, 3. Polarity, 4. Correct Connection, 5. EFLI, 6. RCD Trip Time.
